---
pagetitle: "About Me"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    tbl-colwidths: [30, 60]
---

# Education

+----------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Sept 2020 - Jul 2024 | PhD in Behavioural Science                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                      | Warwick Business School, University of Warwick                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                      | -   Designed lab experiment in oTree with Python to understand coordination in various social interactions such as noncompliance detection and prevention in one-off interactions, as well as turn-taking behavior in repeated interactions |
|                      | -   Discussed theoretically computation of bargaining power when a bargaining procedure is present based on [Virtual Bargaining](https://doi.org/10.1098/rstb.2013.0487)                                                                    |
|                      | -   Conducted quantitative analysis with R                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
+----------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
+----------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Sept 2019 - Aug 2020 | MPhil in Business and Management                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                      | Warwick Business School, University of Warwick                                                                                                                                                                                              |
+----------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
+----------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Sept 2017 - Oct 2018 | MSc in Behavioural and Economic Science                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                      | University of Warwick                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                      | -   Designed lab experiment in oTree with Python to explore human cooperative behaviour in a two-agent repeated interaction                                                                                                                 |
|                      | -   Conducted quantitative analysis with R                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
+----------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
+----------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Sept 2015 - Aug 2017 | BBA in Applied Economics                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                      | Hong Kong Baptist University                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
+----------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
+----------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Jun 2016 - Aug 2016  | Pembroke King’s Programme 2016                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                      | University of Cambridge                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
+----------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
+----------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Jun 2014 - Jun 2014  | English Immersion Programme                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                      | The University of Queensland                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
+----------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
+----------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Sept 2013 - Aug 2015 | Associate Degree Programme, Associate of Science, Professional Accountancy                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
|                      | Hong Kong Baptist University                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
+----------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
+----------------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

# Experience

+----------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Sept 2024 - Present  | Advisor                                                                                                                                                                                |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                      | Warwick Business School PhD Students Society                                                                                                                                           |
+----------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+----------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Apr 2024 - Oct 2024  | Webmaster                                                                                                                                                                              |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                      | EGUK/CGVC                                                                                                                                                                              |
+----------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+----------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Feb 2024 - Aug 2024  | Co-President                                                                                                                                                                           |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                      | Warwick Business School PhD Students Society                                                                                                                                           |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                      | -   Assisted President with strategic goals setting for the society                                                                                                                    |
+----------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+----------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Nov 2022 – Jan 2024  | Lab Assistant                                                                                                                                                                          |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                      | University of Warwick                                                                                                                                                                  |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                      | -   Undertook teaching tasks within a class, seminar, and tutorial or equivalent context in order to progress the student learning about psychological theories and models with MATLAB |
+----------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+----------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Jul 2022 – Sept 2023 | Vice President and Experiment Design Advisor                                                                                                                                           |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                      | Warwick Behavioural Insights Team                                                                                                                                                      |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                      | -   Assisted President with strategic goals setting for the society                                                                                                                    |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                      | -   Worked directly within Heads of both units and members to build better engagement and collaborations                                                                               |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                      | -   Provided advice on Intervention Design for Nudge Unit team projects                                                                                                                |
+----------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+----------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Jan 2020 – Mar 2020  | Behavioural Science: Lab Assistant                                                                                                                                                     |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                      | Warwick Business School, University of Warwick                                                                                                                                         |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                      | -   Undertook teaching tasks within a class, seminar, and tutorial or equivalent context in order to progress the student learning about Big Data and R                                |
+----------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+----------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| May 2019 – Aug 2019  | Research Assistant                                                                                                                                                                     |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                      | Warwick Business School, University of Warwick                                                                                                                                         |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                      | -   Conducted literature review for a working paper                                                                                                                                    |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                      | -   Designed lab experiment code in oTree with Python                                                                                                                                  |
+----------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+----------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Oct 2017 – Oct 2018  | Behavioural Nudge Analyst and Founding Member                                                                                                                                          |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                      | Warwick Behavioural Insights Team                                                                                                                                                      |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                      | -   Conducted qualitative and quantitative research on end-of-term food wastage in a team of 6                                                                                         |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                      | -   Formulated environmental nudge proposal to reduce food wastage                                                                                                                     |
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|                      | -   Presented proposal to a panel of stakeholders, including lecturers and university estate staff                                                                                     |
+----------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
|                      |                                                                                                                                                                                        |
+----------------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+

# Skills

::::::::::::::::::::::: colunmns
:::: {.column width="48%"}
::: {.callout-tip title="R" icon="false" collapse="true"}
-   Statistical Analysis
-   Time Series Analysis
-   Data Visualization with ggplot2, Plotly and Leaflet
-   Web Development with Shiny and Quarto
-   Web scrapping
-   Creating package
-   Data Manipulation with dplyr, data.table
-   Machine Learning
:::
::::

:::: {.column width="48%"}
::: {.callout-warning title="Python" icon="false" collapse="true"}
-   Conducting web-based interactive tasks with oTree
-   Data Manipulation with Pandas
-   Statistical Analysis
-   Data Visualization with Matplotlib
-   NumPy and SciPy
-   Machine Learning
:::
::::

:::: {.column width="48%"}
::: {.callout-tip title="Git" icon="false" collapse="true"}
-   Version Control with repository
-   Website Deployment (with Shiny (Shinylive) and Quarto)
:::
::::

:::: {.column width="48%"}
::: {.callout-warning title="SQL" icon="false" collapse="true"}
-   Data Manipulation
-   Aggregate Functions
-   Connecting Tables
:::
::::

:::: {.column width="48%"}
::: {.callout-warning title="Matlab" icon="false" collapse="true"}
-   Statistical Analysis
-   Data Visualization
-   Simulation (Agent-Based Modelling)
:::
::::

:::: {.column width="48%"}
::: {.callout-caution title="Stata" icon="false" collapse="true"}
-   Data Management
-   Statistical Analysis
-   Regression Analysis
-   Data Visualization
:::
::::

:::: {.column width="48%"}
::: {.callout-caution title="Mplus" icon="false" collapse="true"}
-   Data Management
-   Data Analysis such as Structural Equation Modelling
-   Connecting with R
:::
::::

:::: {.column width="48%"}
::: {.callout-caution title="SPSS" icon="false" collapse="true"}
-   Data Management
-   Statistical Analysis
-   Data Visualization
:::
::::

:::: {.column width="48%"}
::: {.callout-caution title="Astro" icon="false" collapse="true"}
-   Web Development with HTML, Javascript and CSS
:::
::::

:::: {.column width="48%"}
::: {.callout-tip title="Microsoft software" icon="false" collapse="true"}
-   Word
-   PowerPoint
-   Excel
:::
::::
:::::::::::::::::::::::
